mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_respi WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY exam_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_respi WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_respi WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_respi WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_respi (worker_name, department, exposure_type, exposure_substance, exposure_level, ppe_type, fit_test_date, fit_test_result, pft_fvc, pft_fev1, skin_condition, patch_test_result, status, exam_date, examiner, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerName}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{exposureType}, #{exposureSubstance,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{exposureLevel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ppeType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{fitTestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{fitTestResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{pftFvc,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pftFev1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{skinCondition,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{patchTestResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{examiner,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_respi SET worker_name = #{workerName}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, exposure_type = #{exposureType}, exposure_substance = #{exposureSubstance,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, exposure_level = #{exposureLevel,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ppe_type = #{ppeType,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, fit_test_date = #{fitTestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, fit_test_result = #{fitTestResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, pft_fvc = #{pftFvc,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pft_fev1 = #{pftFev1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, skin_condition = #{skinCondition,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, patch_test_result = #{patchTestResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, exam_date = #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, examiner = #{examiner,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_respi SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
